title: Seeds, Origins, Paths, Budgets, and Kill Policy · Go Semantics Case: Path Method Query
summary: One starting URL expands to subdomains, calendar archives, query permutations, media files, logout actions, and endless retries with no explicit resource ceiling. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go path method query increment in testable bounded crawl charter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed…
objectives: Express methods, path prefixes, queries, fragments, pagination, downloads, forms, and content types as deterministic admission rules.
Define allowed schemes, ASCII hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and embedded resources under deny-by-default policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
